initCommands: Xvnc :0 -geometry 1920x1080 -depth 24 -SecurityTypes None -rfbport 5900 -AlwaysShared -AcceptSetDesktopSize -desktop yaac >/tmp/xvnc.log 2>&1 & until [ -S /tmp/.X11-unix/X0 ]; do sleep 0.1; done && (while true; do matchbox-window-manager -use_titlebar no >>/tmp/matchbox.log 2>&1; sleep 1; done) & websockify -D --web=/usr/share/novnc 6080 localhost:5900
